name: Caldo Callego (Spanish Vegetable and Sausage
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Seeded and diced canned Italian tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3- to 4-quart saucepan, heat olive oil over high heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is translucent, about 1 to 2 minutes.
3. Stir in water and the beef broth mix until dissolved.
4. Reduce heat to low. Add potatoes, tomatoes, carrot, and bay leaf; cover and simmer until vegetables are tender, approximately 35 to 40 minutes.
5. Stir in remaining ingredients. Cook sausage and chick-peas for about 5 more minutes until heated through.
6. Remove and discard the bay leaf before serving.
7. Makes 4 servings, about 1 1/3 cups each.
